title: Big Tech's big AI spending is 'a good thing' right now
summary: The Nasdaq Composite (^IXIC) led US stocks (^DJI, ^GSPC) to daily gains on Tuesday as chip stocks began to show signs of recovering from last week's sell-off. Investors' eyes are especially wide on Big Tech earnings expected out this week. Prime Capital Financial CIO Will McGough sits down with Josh Lipton to comment on what tech investors will want to see in Alphabet's (GOOG, GOOGL) earnings and the rest of the Magnificent Seven performances.

title: Nvidia Vera Rubin shown to provide 10x more throughput per megawatt than Blackwell
summary: Investing.com -- Nvidia announced Tuesday that its Vera Rubin platform is entering production with more than 300 global partners across 350 factory sites in 30 countries. Partners including CoreWeave, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure, Oracle Cloud Infrastructure and Mistral are deploying the new rack-scale AI system.

title: 1 Ultra-High-Yield ETF Millions Are Buying That Could Wreck Your Retirement
summary: Millions of dividend investors are parking billions into a covered call ETF that silently erodes wealth while promising fat monthly payouts, and the fund's own issuer quietly revealed the flaw years ago by building something better.

title: Jim Cramer Says Stop Betting on Volatile Tech Stocks and Buy These “Boring” Sectors Instead
summary: Jim Cramer compared owning tech stocks to being tied to railroad tracks while a freight train approaches, and he has a very specific set of sectors in mind as the escape route.
